hypothesis: In REINVENT4 singlet fission optimization, replacing fixed diversity thresholds with a stepwise proportional–integral controller that tunes penalty weights to keep (i) mean pairwise ECFP6 Tanimoto similarity at 0.12±0.01 and (ii) the number of SMILES 10-grams occurring in >3% of molecules below 50 will yield, after 1000 iterations, a median molecular score within 5%
